description_long: This object consists of three rectangular juice cartons, each with a white base color and vibrant orange-themed graphics, arranged in a scattered group. The cartons feature realistic images of orange slices and whole oranges, along with bold text indicating 'Orange 100%' and other product details. Each carton is equipped with a white plastic straw inserted into a designated spot on the top, emphasizing its ready-to-drink nature. The packaging includes visible brand labels, nutritional information panels, and product claims, all printed in red, green, and white. The cartons have a glossy, smooth finish typical of laminated beverage packaging, and the straws are thin and slightly flexible. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in an urban environment such as a park bench, sidewalk, or convenience store.
description: A group of three glossy orange juice cartons with straws, featuring vivid orange fruit graphics and bold product labeling. The cartons are white with orange and red accents, and each has a visible straw for drinking.
description_view_0: Three juice cartons are arranged with one upright and two lying down, showing orange fruit graphics, straws, and product labels.
description_view_1: The upright carton displays a large orange slice and 'Orange 100%' text, while the other two cartons are seen from the side and top.
description_view_2: The back of the upright carton reveals nutritional information, and the straws are clearly visible on all three cartons.
description_view_3: The front of the upright carton prominently shows 'Orange 100%' with orange slices, and the group arrangement is evident.
